The Court stated that it had difficulty keeping track of the names and who is who. Ms. Allen stated that she believes Emilia Havitschovou and Emma Vachelova are one in the same, that the census records both show the same marriage dates, that they contacted Radan's Granddaughter and that she indicated he went by both names (Radan and Radvan). The Petition for Determination of Entitlement to Estate Distribution is under submission.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Wu. Not reported.
